# `api.lookup.get_by_key_and_id`

> `GET /lookup/{masterConstantKey}/{valueId}` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_by_key_and_id(key: str, value_id: str) -> LookupValue
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_by_key_and_id <key> <value_id>
```

GET /lookup/{masterConstantKey}/{valueId}

## Response

Returns `LookupValue`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Value ID (Guid) |
| `key` | `Optional[str]` | no | Master data key |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Display name |
| `value` | `Optional[str]` | no | Value (Guid) |
